bad.py.reason: Archive extraction without member validation can allow path traversal.
Joining untrusted path segments can bypass intended root boundaries.
World-writable file modes violate least-privilege defaults.

bad_extended.py.reason: shell=True execution increases command injection risk.
eval/exec introduces dynamic code execution risk.
Unsafe YAML loaders can deserialize attacker-controlled objects.
Temporary files with delete=False require strict cleanup controls.
Permissive file modes should be rejected in security-sensitive code.
